title: ulmaria palustris var. denudata
intro: Ulmaria palustris var. denudata, also known as denuded marshmallow or bare-stemmed marshmallow, is a variety of the marshmallow plant (Althaea officinalis) that grows in marshy areas. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and soothing effects, which have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Ulmaria palustris var. denudata include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and ointments, or used as a tincture, allowing for various ways to harness its medicinal properties.
